name: settings-01
title: Settings panel
description: A settings card with profile fields, notification switches and save/cancel actions. Use as an account or preferences page.

files.content:
import * as React from "react" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label" import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator" import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch" const toggles = [ { id: "marketing", label: "Marketing emails", description: "Receive product news and occasional offers.", defaultChecked: false, }, { id: "security", label: "Security alerts", description: "Get notified about new sign-ins and password changes.", defaultChecked: true, }, ] export function Settings({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) { return (
Profile Update your account details. This information is private.
{toggles.map((toggle) => (

{toggle.description}

))}
) }
